TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ining, title = Ining, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ining} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Ining == Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Ining a niyaro', 769 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,487 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 23% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 581 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 77% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,906 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 18%, Paiwan 3%, Puyuma 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u iniŋ == itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u iniŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Ining == Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Ining a niyaro', 769 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,487 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 23% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 581 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 77% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,906 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 18%, Paiwan 3%, Puyuma 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u iniŋ == itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u iniŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
